title: Year 10 Te Reo Māori: Cultural Heritage Presentation
subject: Te Reo Māori
learningObjectives: Develop deep understanding of te reo māori concepts in cultural context
Apply traditional knowledge to modern te reo māori challenges
Analyze environmental impacts through te reo māori frameworks
Engage with community perspectives on te reo māori issues
activities: Cultural mapping and te reo māori analysis
Traditional knowledge workshop and te reo māori integration
Environmental investigation using te reo māori methods
Community interview project on te reo māori applications
Sustainability challenge with te reo māori solutions
Cultural artifact study through te reo māori lens
resources: Cultural knowledge databases and te reo māori resources
Traditional knowledge holders and te reo māori experts
Environmental monitoring tools and te reo māori software
Community engagement platforms and te reo māori forums
Sustainability assessment frameworks and te reo māori models
assessment: Environmental impact assessment using te reo māori frameworks
nzcAlignment: Te Tiriti o Waitangi and its applications

culturalContext: Māori cultural knowledge and Aotearoa context
learningObjectives: Develop deep understanding of technology concepts in cultural context
Apply traditional knowledge to modern technology challenges
Analyze environmental impacts through technology frameworks
Engage with community perspectives on technology issues
activities: Cultural mapping and technology analysis
Traditional knowledge workshop and technology integration
Environmental investigation using technology methods
Community interview project on technology applications
Sustainability challenge with technology solutions
Cultural artifact study through technology lens
resources: Cultural knowledge databases and technology resources
Traditional knowledge holders and technology experts
Environmental monitoring tools and technology software
Community engagement platforms and technology forums
Sustainability assessment frameworks and technology models
assessment: Traditional knowledge demonstration in technology contexts
nzcAlignment: Te Tiriti o Waitangi and its applications
